svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:151.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/151.0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="p1c6VzZRCQT7bo49u8MN"> <mxGraphModel dx="1503" dy="1005" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title WearItRight - Entity Relationship Diagram

skinparam linetype ortho
skinparam entityBackgroundColor #F8FAFC
skinparam entityBorderColor #334155
skinparam entityFontSize 12
skinparam ArrowColor #475569

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' IDENTITY AND ACCESS
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

entity \"user\" as user {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * email : VARCHAR(255)
 * password_hash : VARCHAR(255)
 * status : VARCHAR(20)
 * created_at : TIMESTAMP
 last_login_at : TIMESTAMP
}

entity \"role\" as role {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * name : VARCHAR(20)
}

entity \"user_role\" as user_role {
 * user_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * role_id : UUID <<FK>>
}

entity \"user_session\" as user_session {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * access_token : VARCHAR(512)
 * expires_at : TIMESTAMP
 * is_active : BOOLEAN
}

entity \"password_reset_token\" as prt {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * token : VARCHAR(512)
 * expires_at : TIMESTAMP
 used_at : TIMESTAMP
}

entity \"consent_record\" as consent_record {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * consent_type : VARCHAR(30)
 * granted : BOOLEAN
 * recorded_at : TIMESTAMP
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' PROFILE AND PREFERENCES
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

entity \"user_preferences\" as user_preferences {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_id : UUID <<FK>>
 budget_min : DECIMAL(10,2)
 budget_max : DECIMAL(10,2)
 display_currency : CHAR(3)
 * updated_at : TIMESTAMP
}

entity \"user_style_preference\" as user_style_pref {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_preferences_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * preference_value : VARCHAR(100)
}

entity \"user_preferred_color\" as user_pref_color {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_preferences_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * color_value : VARCHAR(50)
}

entity \"size_profile\" as size_profile {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_id : UUID <<FK>>
 top_size : VARCHAR(10)
 bottom_size : VARCHAR(10)
 footwear_size : VARCHAR(10)
}

entity \"exclusion_preferences\" as exclusion_prefs {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_id : UUID <<FK>>
}

entity \"exclusion_color\" as excl_color {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * exclusion_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * color_value : VARCHAR(50)
}

entity \"exclusion_pattern\" as excl_pattern {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * exclusion_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * pattern_value : VARCHAR(100)
}

entity \"exclusion_category\" as excl_category {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * exclusion_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * category : VARCHAR(30)
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' CONTEXT AND RECOMMENDATION
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

entity \"location_context\" as location_context {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * source : VARCHAR(15)
 * city : VARCHAR(100)
 * country_code : CHAR(2)
 latitude : DECIMAL(9,6)
 longitude : DECIMAL(9,6)
 * captured_at : TIMESTAMP
}

note bottom of location_context
 LLR 12.4: Precise geolocation (lat/lon)
 stored only with active user consent.
 Not retained as historical log.
end note

entity \"event_context\" as event_context {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * event_type : VARCHAR(20)
 dress_code : VARCHAR(30)
 event_time : VARCHAR(10)
}

entity \"weather_snapshot\" as weather_snapshot {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * temperature_c : DECIMAL(5,2)
 * precipitation_chance : DECIMAL(5,2)
 * humidity : DECIMAL(5,2)
 wind_kph : DECIMAL(5,2)
 * observed_at : TIMESTAMP
 * expires_at : TIMESTAMP
}

note bottom of weather_snapshot
 LLR 13.4: Cached with configurable TTL
 (default max 30 min, NFR-09).
end note

entity \"recommendation_request\" as rec_request {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * location_context_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * event_context_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * weather_snapshot_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * requested_at : TIMESTAMP
}

entity \"outfit_recommendation\" as outfit_rec {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * request_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * rank : INTEGER
 * relevance_score : DECIMAL(5,4)
 * estimated_total_price : DECIMAL(10,2)
 * created_at : TIMESTAMP
}

entity \"outfit_item\" as outfit_item {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * outfit_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * category : VARCHAR(20)
 * is_optional : BOOLEAN
}

entity \"recommendation_explanation\" as rec_explanation {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * outfit_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * weather_reason : TEXT
 * event_reason : TEXT
}

entity \"style_tip\" as style_tip {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * outfit_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * tip_text : TEXT
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' SHOPPING AND COMPARISON
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

entity \"shopping_provider\" as shopping_provider {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * name : VARCHAR(100)
 * api_base_url : VARCHAR(255)
 * is_active : BOOLEAN
}

entity \"product_item\" as product_item {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * name : VARCHAR(255)
 * brand : VARCHAR(100)
 * category : VARCHAR(20)
 color : VARCHAR(50)
 image_url : VARCHAR(512)
}

entity \"product_offer\" as product_offer {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * product_item_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * provider_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * currency : CHAR(3)
 * price : DECIMAL(10,2)
 * normalized_price : DECIMAL(10,2)
 * in_stock : BOOLEAN
 * product_url : VARCHAR(512)
 * last_checked_at : TIMESTAMP
}

entity \"product_match\" as product_match {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * outfit_item_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * product_item_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * match_score : DECIMAL(5,4)
}

entity \"price_comparison_result\" as price_comparison {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * product_item_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * best_offer_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * calculated_at : TIMESTAMP
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' FAVORITES
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

entity \"favorite_outfit\" as favorite_outfit {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * outfit_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * saved_at : TIMESTAMP
}

entity \"favorite_item\" as favorite_item {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * user_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * offer_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * saved_at : TIMESTAMP
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' OPERATIONS AND QUALITY
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

entity \"audit_log\" as audit_log {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 user_id : UUID <<FK>>
 * event_type : VARCHAR(30)
 * correlation_id : VARCHAR(100)
 event_data : JSON
 * created_at : TIMESTAMP
}

entity \"metric_sample\" as metric_sample {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * name : VARCHAR(100)
 * value : DECIMAL(15,4)
 tags : JSON
 * recorded_at : TIMESTAMP
}

entity \"resilience_policy\" as resilience_policy {
 * id : UUID <<PK>>
 --
 * target_system : VARCHAR(100)
 * timeout_ms : INTEGER
 * retry_count : INTEGER
 * circuit_breaker_threshold : INTEGER
}

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' RELATIONSHIPS - Identity and Access
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

user ||--o{ user_role : \"assigned\"
role ||--o{ user_role : \"granted to\"
user ||--o{ user_session : \"maintains\"
user ||--o{ prt : \"requests\"
user ||--o{ consent_record : \"records\"
user ||--o{ audit_log : \"generates\"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' RELATIONSHIPS - Profile and Preferences
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

user ||--|| user_preferences : \"has\"
user_preferences ||--o{ user_style_pref : \"lists\"
user_preferences ||--o{ user_pref_color : \"lists\"
user ||--|| size_profile : \"has\"
user ||--|| exclusion_prefs : \"has\"
exclusion_prefs ||--o{ excl_color : \"excludes\"
exclusion_prefs ||--o{ excl_pattern : \"excludes\"
exclusion_prefs ||--o{ excl_category : \"excludes\"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' RELATIONSHIPS - Context and Recommendation
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

user ||--o{ rec_request : \"submits\"
rec_request }o--|| location_context : \"uses\"
rec_request }o--|| event_context : \"uses\"
rec_request }o--|| weather_snapshot : \"uses\"
rec_request ||--|{ outfit_rec : \"produces\"
outfit_rec ||--|{ outfit_item : \"contains\"
outfit_rec ||--|| rec_explanation : \"explained by\"
outfit_rec ||--|{ style_tip : \"enriched with\"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' RELATIONSHIPS - Shopping and Comparison
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

outfit_item ||--o{ product_match : \"matched via\"
product_match }o--|| product_item : \"references\"
product_item ||--|{ product_offer : \"offered via\"
product_offer }o--|| shopping_provider : \"sourced from\"
product_item ||--o| price_comparison : \"ranked in\"
price_comparison }o--|| product_offer : \"best offer\"

' ─────────────────────────────────────────────
' RELATIONSHIPS - Favorites
' ─────────────────────────────────────────────

user ||--o{ favorite_outfit : \"saves\"
favorite_outfit }o--|| outfit_rec : \"references\"
user ||--o{ favorite_item : \"saves\"
favorite_item }o--|| product_offer : \"references\"

@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="CSTFSE6Sx-oJ1SF90R3_-5"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1722" width="3195" x="760" y="1050" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
